kurinci.heading: A Tamil community took root here.
kurinci.body: Mountains are where the deepest bonds form. In Tamil literary tradition, குறிஞ்சி — the mountain landscape — is the tinai of union, belonging, and love that endures. This is the spirit that brought our community together.

mullai.heading: Five roots. One tree.
mullai.poemEn: In the forest, seeds grow in patient darkness. This is Mullai — the landscape of learning.

school.en: Tamil Language School — K through High School

pattarai.en: Pattarai Creative Studio — Arts & cultural expression

music.en: Carnatic Music Club — Tradition in practice

volunteer.en: Volunteer Program — Serving the broader community

marutam.heading: Every gathering, a ceremony.
marutam.poemEn: In the cultivated field, community gathers for the harvest. This is Marutam — the landscape of celebration.

neytal.heading: Our children carry the light forward.
neytal.body: From Tamil oratory to Carnatic music, our community's children are showing Wisconsin — and the world — what Tamil excellence looks like.
neytal.poemEn: Across the sea, they carried culture. This is Neytal — the landscape of longing and achievement.

palai.heading: New to Wisconsin? You are home.
palai.body: Whether you arrived last month or fifteen years ago, Sun Prairie Tamil Society is your community. Our board volunteers their time so that no Tamil family faces the desert journey alone.
palai.poemEn: The desert journey takes courage. Newcomers and volunteers — you are welcome here.

footer.desc: Tamil culture, alive in Wisconsin since 2012. A volunteer-run community of families.
